source_units.text_raw:
All uses as permitted in the Downtown Core (DC) Zone;
Limited Car Rental Operation; and
Marina
Only those uses listed below shall be permitted on the ground floor of a Building in the WF Zone immediately abutting a designated Walkable Street (Map C):
Eating and Drinking Establishments;
Tourism related services including but not limited to, information services, touring services, or personal equipment rentals;
Retail Store; and
Cultural Establishment;
A minimum of 60% of the ground floor shall be designated to the above uses.
Map C. Walkable Streets
Properties in the DWF Zone are eligible for a Bonus Height subject to the following regulations.
The maximum Height as specified on Map D may be exceeded to the maximum bonus Height as specified on Map E.
A bonus of up to a maximum Building Height of 24.5m (80.4 ft) for properties fronting on Water St.
A bonus of up to a maximum Building Height of 32.5m (106.6 ft) for all other properties.
Parking Structures are ineligible for a Bonus Height.
Massing for buildings up to 21.3 m (69.9 ft):
The components above the base Building that are a bonus in Height shall be subject to:
A minimum 3.0m (9.8ft) Stepback from the base Building on the front façade.
A minimum 5.5m (18ft) Side Yard Setback or Stepback to ensure adequate separation distances of the upper levels from adjacent properties that may also be eligible for a Height bonus.
A 45-degree angular planes originating from the top of the flank or rear façade of the base Building that faces abutting properties.
Massing for Buildings greater than 21.3 m (69.9 ft):
The components above the base Building that are a bonus in Height shall be subject to:
A minimum 6.0m (19.7ft) Stepback above the base Building or above that portion of the Building that is taller than 21.3 m (69.9 ft) on the front façade.
The portion of the Building above 21.3 m (69.9 ft) shall have:
A maximum gross floor plate size of 750 sq m (8,072.9 sq ft);
A minimum 10m (32.8 ft) interior Yard Setbacks; and
A maximum 25.0m (82 ft) Building width addressing the Street.
Bonus Height applications are subject to the provisions in the Bonus Height Applications Section of this by-law.
Map D: Maximum Height
16.5 m (54.1 ft) 24.5 m (80.4 ft)
Map E: Maximum Bonus Height
The minimum finished floor elevation (FFE) shall not apply to Parking Structures, Accessory Buildings, or any water related Structures
Any existing residential use presently below the required elevation may expand, provided the expansion area satisfies the minimum finished floor elevation (FFE) requirements. 24.5m (80.4 ft) 32.5m (106.6 ft)

Limited Car Rental Operation; and
Marina

sections_raw.section_title_raw: PERMITTED LAND USES AT GRADE ON WALKABLE STREETS

clauses_raw.clause_text_raw: Only those uses listed below shall be permitted on the ground floor of a Building in the WF Zone immediately abutting a designated Walkable Street (Map C):
Eating and Drinking Establishments;
Tourism related services including but not limited to, information services, touring services, or personal equipment rentals;
Retail Store; and
Cultural Establishment;
A minimum of 60% of the ground floor shall be designated to the above uses.
Map C. Walkable Streets

cells_raw.cell_text_raw: Minimum: 10 m (32.3 ft) Maximum: 16.5 m (54.1 ft) properties adjacent to Water St Maximum: 24.5 m (80.4 ft) for all other properties.
Maximum: 1.5 m (4.9 ft) on Water St Maximum: 4 m (13.1 ft) on all other streets.
A Setback may be permitted but not to exceed 20% of the Lot Width or Lot Depth. “All buildings shall be setback a minimum of 8m (26.2ft) from the ordinary high water mark.”
Maximum: 15.5 m (50.9 ft) on Water St Maximum: 16.5 m (54.1 ft) on all other streets
Minimum 1.0 m (3.3 ft) from street line, and Maximum 2.5 m (8.2 ft) projection; OR Within the minimum and maximum range of the existing Buildings on the Block.

Low-Rise Building: A low-rise building may be setback from the interior lot line. This setback may not exceed 20% of the lot frontage; Mid-Rise Building: Massing for mid-rise Buildings with a height above 13 m (42.6 ft) or the height of the streetwall, the mid-rise portion of a building shall be step-back from the interior lot lines no less than 10% of the lot frontage or 5.5m (18ft); whichever is less. Where a lot has more than one streetline, the greater lot width shall be applied.”
Minimum 3.76 m CGVD28 (Canadian Geodetic Vertical Datum 1928)
